name: WeWork Inc.
description: WeWork Inc. is an American company headquartered in New York City that provides flexible workspace solutions, including physical and virtual shared office spaces, to individuals and enterprises globally. Founded in 2010, the company focuses on delivering technology-driven, turnkey office environments designed to foster collaboration and community. WeWork operates a vast network of buildings across numerous cities worldwide, offering customized services that cater to the needs of freelancers, startups, and large corporations alike, aiming to reimagine the modern workplace experience through flexible, on-demand access to professional office infrastructure.
